title: The Angel of Bar 21
original_title: เทพธิดา บาร์ 21
overview: Linda, an escort girl at the Bar 21 was an eye witness of a murder case committed by Thanong's brother. Thanong was the guy she was having a good feeling with him. She was then brought to a situation which she had to make the decision.
